    14→    Function GeneraOAuth2_ClientCredentials(url As String, consumerKey As String, consumerSecret As String) As Bearer
    15→        Dim result As New Bearer

    27→        bearerReq.Method = "POST"
    28→        bearerReq.ContentType = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
    29→        bearerReq.ContentLength = byte1.Length
    30→        bearerReq.KeepAlive = False
    31→        bearerReq.Credentials = CredentialCache.DefaultCredentials
    32→        bearerReq.Headers.Add("Authorization", "Basic " + Convert.ToBase64String(Encoding.Default.GetBytes(consumerKey + ":" + consumerSecret)))
    33→        bearerReq.Timeout = 15000
    34→
    35→
    36→        Try
    37→
    38→
    39→            Using newStream As Stream = bearerReq.GetRequestStream()
    40→                newStream.Write(byte1, 0, byte1.Length)

    42→
    43→            Using bearerResp As HttpWebResponse = (bearerReq.GetResponse())
    44→                Using reader = New StreamReader(bearerResp.GetResponseStream(), Encoding.UTF8)

    51→        End Try
    52→
    53→
    54→        Return result
